title: linochilus obtusus
intro: Linochilus obtusus, also known as the obtuse linochilus, is a plant species that belongs to the mint family and is native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpenoids and other bioactive compounds. The medicinal properties of Linochilus obtusus have been reported to provide various health benefits, including relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and soothing respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of ailments.
